coverage.notes: Checkout rates apply to UK mainland postcodes. Remote and offshore destinations require manual quote before acceptance.

services.name: Collection
services.description: Customer collection by prior arrangement from Stockport (Offerton) when order is marked ready.
conditions: Must book collection slot by phone or email
Photo ID / order number on pickup
Free of charge when stock reserved

services.name: Standard tracked (UK mainland)
services.description: Economy tracked parcel service for small to medium consignments.

rate_suggestions.note: Suggested free standard carriage threshold for standard parcels

services.name: Express next working day (UK mainland)
services.description: Next working day tracked service when ordered before cut-off and stock available.

rate_suggestions.note: Reduced express surcharge above free-standard threshold

oversize_and_trade.cable_drum_note: Cable drums and long lengths may require pallet or specialist carrier — quote manually.
trade_account_notes: Approved trade accounts may receive negotiated free-carriage thresholds
Site deliveries need site contact name and mobile number
Failed delivery / excess waiting time may be recharged at carrier cost

exclusions: Live rates must be validated against chosen carrier contracts before go-live
Highlands, islands and NI not covered by flat mainland suggestions
Hazmat rules for certain battery shipments may restrict air/express methods
